title: Project Manager | Construction & Infrastructure
description:
• Up to S$8,000 Basic + S$100 Mobile Allowance + AWS + Performance Bonus.

  • Location: Bugis area.

    • Transport allowance provided if site locations are far from MRT stations.

  • Monday – Friday & Alternate Saturdays | 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM.

  • Minimum 5 years in construction project management, specifically in Cost Control and Budgeting.

Join an established firm at the heart of Singapore's urban development. As a Project Manager, you will be the primary driver of site execution, ensuring that complex engineering and building projects move seamlessly from the kick-off meeting to final handover. You will balance technical oversight with commercial acumen, managing diverse teams of subcontractors and consultants while maintaining strict adherence to budget and quality standards.

Responsibilities:

  • Organize site setup and sequential job planning to ensure smooth execution, achieving cost, quality, and timeline objectives.

  • Coordinate effectively with sub-contractors, consultants, client representatives, and relevant government authorities.

  • Attend and lead project kick-off meetings and team updates; prepare progress reports and detailed work programs.

  • Oversee all site staff and sub-contractors’ schedules. Monitor work progress and provide immediate, practical solutions to on-site issues.

  • Take full ownership of cost control and budgeting to ensure project profitability and customer satisfaction.

Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Building, Structural, Mechanical Engineering, or an equivalent technical field.

  • At least 5 years of relevant construction experience.

  • Strong background in Project Management, Budgeting, and Cost Control is mandatory.

  • Highly self-motivated with a positive attitude, team-oriented mindset, and a high level of professionalism and integrity.

Others Information:

  • High basic salary with AWS and bonuses tied to company profitability.

  • Annual Leave starts at 14 days, increasing up to 22 days based on years of service.

  • Head office based in the vibrant Bugis district, with site-specific transport support.


Please indicate the following information in your resume:

  • Current & Expected salary.

  • Reason(s) for leaving previous roles.

  • Availability to commence work.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT NOW SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
